channel.title: OpenEmu-Silicon Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: OpenEmu-Silicon 1.0.0
item.description:
OpenEmu-Silicon 1.0.0

First public release — native Apple Silicon port of OpenEmu.

  • All 25+ emulation cores rebuilt for ARM64 — no Rosetta required
  • Sony PSP — PPSSPP-Core fully integrated
  • Nintendo 64 — Mupen64Plus revived
  • Sega Dreamcast — migrated from Reicast to Flycast
  • ScreenScraper cover art — automatic box art fetching from ScreenScraper.eu
  • SNES9x updated to 1.63, mGBA updated to 0.10.5
  • Pokémon Mini and Watara Supervision fixed
  • macOS 26 (Tahoe) compatibility fixes throughout
